```jsx
import React, { Component } from 'react';
import { Header, Content } from 'components/Page';
import ExcelExport from 'components/ExcelExport';
import intl from 'hzero-front/lib/utils/intl';
import { Icon, Button as C7NProButton } from 'choerodon-ui/pro';
import DynamicButtons from "../../components/DynamicButtons";

export default class RouteIndex extends Component {

  buttons = [
    {
      name: "excelExport",
      btnComp: ExcelExport,
      btnProps: {
        requestUrl: `/ssrc/v1/30/rfx/all/excel`,
        queryParams: {},
      },
    },
    {
      name: "creatRFIManually",
      group: true,
      children: [
        {
          name: "RFI",
          btnType: "c7n-pro",
          child: intl
          .get(`ssrc.inquiryHall.view.message.button.creatRFIManually`)
          .d('手工创建RFI'),
          btnProps: {
            onClick: ()=>console.log("btn1"),
          },
        },
      ],
      child: (
        <C7NProButton funcType="flat">
            + {intl.get('ssrc.inquiryHall.model.inquiryHall.newRFI').d('新建RFI')}
          <Icon type="arrow_drop_down" />
        </C7NProButton>
      ),
    },
  ];

  render() {

    return (
      <>
        <Header title="ceshi">
          <DynamicButtons buttons={this.buttons} />
        </Header>
        <Content>
          123
        </Content>
      </>
    );
  }
}
```
